title: Containers on Amazon ECS with Mama J
summary: AWS Developers educational video explaining containers, Docker images, and Amazon ECS orchestration. The video covers the problem containers solve, Docker fundamentals, ECS management at scale, Fargate vs EC2 options, and includes a shopping-app example with auto-scaling.
writeup: This AWS Developers video walks through containerization on Amazon ECS, starting with the problem containers solve and the fundamentals of Docker images. It covers how ECS orchestrates and manages containers at scale, contrasting the Fargate and EC2 launch options. A shopping-app example demonstrates auto-scaling in practice, tying the concepts to a concrete workload.
